## TRM1.4. Air traffic control pre-departure delay (PI#2) {#trm1.4.-air-traffic-control-pre-departure-delay-pi2 .Heading-2-TZ}

Lisbon and Porto are the only Portuguese airports subject to the monitoring of this indicator.

In Lisbon, delay in 2025 increased to 5.54 min/dep, 21% higher than 2024 value-- last year of RP3 -- of 4.59 min/dep. This is the highest across all airports monitored in RP4.

In Porto, delay in 2025 decreased to 0.69 min/dep, almost equal to 2024 value-- last year of RP3 -- of 0.61 min/dep.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATC pre-departure delay across Member States and for which enough data is available in 2025 was 0.74 min/dep.
